name: Nyrixa
background:
Like most families on Brentaal IV, the House Darsak made sure their newborn heir was surrounded from the start with all things economic. A mobile of various planetary monies spun above Nyrixa's cradle, books on trade and market strategies stood alongside volumes of myths and nursery rhymes on the shelves. It seemed that her family's diligence paid off as from a very young age Nyx showed a great acumen for finance. At her 10th birthday party her grandfather and aunts were heard to say that the pampered heiress was going to be the brightest corporate star Brentaal IV had ever seen. The Gods abhor hubris and too late did the family realize that perhaps they spoke too soon.

After numerous scandals including multiple occasions where Nyrixa was nearly kicked out of Brentaal Commerce Academy for showing up her teachers in mathematic calculations and impertinence; an infamous gurrcat incident that resulted in a large cash payout from House Darsak to the Academy for the loss of one Endorian goat that was used as a teaching tool in the advanced Agricultural Commodities class; involvement with some fairly scandalous parties at the resorts on Brentaal IV and on Spira; no fewer than three broken engagements; and a rumored affair with a singer starring in the Kallea Cycle opera, the House Council decided that while brilliant and highly intelligent, Nyrixa needed a period of time to allow her to work out her wild side. The family voted to remove her from Darsak Shipping and Trading for an indefinite period of time and to send her off world. She would be given several million credits and instructed to prove to her House that she has the ability and wisdom to accept her inheritance and become Head of House Darsak.

Though the reprimand from her House stung her ego, Nyrixa was wise enough to accept the decision gracefully. Taking the money given her, she built up NYDAR Corp from the ground up. The company was formed in order to manage the substantial wealth and prove to not only her family but the entire galaxy that she is more than capable to take on whatever they throw at her. Over the last two years Nyx has honed and exercised her sharp business sense, turning NYDAR Corp into a diversified behemoth with fingers and stock in everything from galactic fashion and modeling to the mining of precious metals on the outer rim. Nyrixa has been spotted at various galactic functions and is beginning to achieve notice in the wider galaxy as an up and coming young businesswoman as well as a notorious high rolling party girl.

name: Orpheus
note:
Why be anonymous?

One or two players have asked who I am. Sometimes, they try to guess. Some former Admin have kiddingly given us a hard time and called us wusses for not telling you.

Here's the truth - we don't tell who we are because we love roleplaying with you guys! Anyone who has ever played an administrator knows it's impossible to RP with an admin character. You simply receive so many questions and interruptions that it can't be done. We could tell you our identities and ask that you not page our RP characters, but as much as we wish that would work, we also know it won't. You guys come up with some fantastic plot ideas, and when you do, of course you want to go over them with us as soon as possible!

In return for our anonymity and our ability to roleplay, what we offer are frequent connections to make sure that when you want to run an idea by us, we're here! That's our job - to serve you and make sure this place remains fun for everyone. Help it to remain fun for us, too - please. All work and no play makes SW1 no fun.

Thanks! And thank you for being such a great group of people!

Where am I?                                  

Back in the saddle, baby :) Eh, I missed the real RP too much, so Josh is going to be slowly reintegrated into the MUSH again. Some details are below and would be considered common knowledge, and can be used freely IC.

Following his retirement from the NR military, Arands returned home to Corellia where his wife (Shannon - player) and two children (Jase and Karissa - both NPCs) live. While working part time with CorSec, he and Shannon (CEO of CEC) invested into the Royale Casino and Hotel in Coronet. He also found time to do test piloting for new hull / engine designs produced by the engineers of New Horizon Designs - his sister's brainchild that Shannon and CEC are financial backers for.

For a short time (year + a few months), he spent a lot of time with the Jedi Master Aurejin and was suspected of being a Force user. Following the Calamari plague, Josh retuned home in time for Corellia to be occupied by the Empire. He and his family are documented Imperial citizens, as of the last Corellia system census.

name: Kajman
background: Self-propelling man-of-war with armor-plated upper deck.
note:
Find yourself sitting around with nothing to do? Then come take a chance and play the game that everyone's talking about!

It's very simple. You draw a card, and whatever is on the card gives you a motivation for a plot that you can run either over the course of 1-2 scenes or, for more intense cards, over a much longer period. Some of them are easy, most of them involve finding and TPing with other people. Here are the rules:
1. Choose a level that you want: 1, 2, or 3, ranging from least to most intensity.
2. Draw a card of that level from the machine and read it.
3. Do what it says on the card! I or another wizard will provide you anything you need that you can't get yourself, but it is up to you to coordinate RP with necessary players (or at least give it a good try. If you try and you can't, page me and I'll help you.)
4. Collect your reward! If the card involved RP, I will award XP based on factors such as number of scenes, number of scenes with players you haven't previously met, etc. I will award more XP if I'm provided with logs from the TP.

NOTE: You are not required to do what is on the card, but you may not immediately draw a new card if you don't like what you've drawn. Cards may be drawn:

Level 1 - Every 2 weeks
Level 2 - Every 6 weeks
Level 3 - Every 12 weeks

So try your luck! You've got to be in it to win it!

I guess I could be pretty pissed off about what happened to me...

And then I remember to relax, and stop trying to hold on to it, and then it flows through me like rain and I can't feel anything but gratitude for every single moment of my stupid little life...

You have no idea what I'm talking about, I'm sure... but don't worry...

You will - someday.

name: Valak
background:
Rigid Imperial garrison commander who stopped halfway through his Army career to transfer to the Navy. He became a brilliant naval commander and rose rapidly from the command of an Interdictor Heavy Cruiser to eventually the top Navy command spot. As the Empire became unstable after the disappearance of Emperor Alaric, Valak left the military and became involved in higher level affairs of the remains of the Galactic Empire.
        As a warlord, Bacharan Valak began the most aggressive period in Imperial history. His march culminated when he declared himself Emperor as rumours began to float that he tampered in something known as the "Dark Side" of the "Force," a form of sorcery that supposedly gives it's wielders great power.
        Under his lengthy regime, the longest since Emperor Palpatine himself, Emperor Valak decimated the rebellion behind the success of the Advanced Death Star and strong military tactics. It is also believed that Valak was responsible for the deaths of several other "Force" users while waging a war against rebel hero Luke Skywalker and his allies.
        It has been rumored that Valak has not been heard from or seen publicly in some months.

name: BC_RSI
note:
RepulsorSports Inc.
Ride like the wind...

RSI has three divisions: retail, management and consulting.

Retail
Ride Like the Wind swoop shops
- A place for the repulsorsport enthusiast -

These shops, named for RSI's slogan, encompass a variety of speed sporting goods and services. The shops are a central place where racers can come to purchase, repair and upgrade swoops as well as simply gather to tinker and shoot the breeze. Most shops feature a garage, showroom, and lounge. Ride Like the Wind garages offer repairs and upgrades as well as space for individuals to work on their own swoops if they so desire. The showrooms feature new and used swoops, other sporting equipment for sale or rent such as repulsor ski's, repulsor snow boards and repulsor wave boards, climbing gear, apparel and accessories. The lounges of Ride like the Wind are a place to meet, hang out and rp for swoopers and fans. Shops can be found near racing arenas on Nar Shadda, Corellia, Selene, Theseus Station at Etti IV and two locations on Caspar, Plaxton City and at RSI's Marin Mountain Resort.

Management
RSI TEAM Management Services

RSI offers swoop team management and recruiting services. For a fee, an RSI consultant will structure, hire and equip a swoop team for you, your business or your faction.

Consutlting
RSI Tracks

This division of RSI offers services including the designing, building, and maintenance of swoop tracks. For a fee, RSI will oversee all phases of swoop track planning, construction and management. A sub-division includes RSI Events and Promotions.

name: Esmeraldas
note:
-- OOC information --                             
        Past: Ezzi was born on Bespin and grew up on Cloud City. She was a part of the Air Defense Force for 12 years, which is where she developed her skills. She volunteered to be apart of Lando Calrissian's forces in the Battle of Endor as well, but wasn't assigned to Gold squadron. Instead she was included in an Op as a pilot in the Black Squadron, and the objective and the mission itself have been completely removed from existance. Back on Cloud City, she was responsible for 3 of those stormtrooper helmets that are displayed in The Sky Bar but isn't prone to talking about it as a comrade was killed in the coup d'etat, to much death already. After retiring from active service she got with a small crew and started running freight, only to leave and find someone else to hangout with as their company got a bit stale.

        Good Name: Ezzi carved out a name for herself during her time in the Air Defense Guard. She is responsible for many deaths, arrests, and scraped ships. In the eyes of many upstanding citizens, she was a hero and someone that made a difference to keep things safe, but in the eyes of those that had ill intent, she was a scourge. Those that are aware of the ongoings upon Bespin would have surely heard about the woman unless they live under a rock, although she doesn't use her given name now days. Later on, after she quit the ADF and did a 180, she took up with a motley crew of misfits running 'freight' for the more nefarious sort. Though it is still low key, there are those that may know her as the name she goes by currently (Ezzi). She quit that crew and they were killed shortly after, having getting themselves caught by Imperials.

        Skills: While she is not a smuggler by trade, she can get by on it. She isn't quite the smooth talker that others are as she tends to let her blaster do that for her. She can be a bit on the hot-headed side at times and forget that perhaps questions should be asked first, not later. She is a very accomplished pilot however, as that is something she has always enjoyed and excelled at over her peers. She is also deft at doing ship repairs as well, having started her spacer career in the shipyard at a young age. Lastly, she is not only agile, but deadly with a blaster.

name: Ambrosia
background:
Life before her service to the New Republic isn't something Ambrosia is keen to disclose, but over the years, some snippets have leaked, rumors passed about, and those in the 'need to know' category have become aware.

 Her service began on Caspar, as an Aide for Ambassador Dean Corso. Promotion came rather unexpectedly, when he was removed from the picture and she was left to run the Embassy in his stead. Since then, she's negotiated 2 treaties with the CDU, birthed a little girl, become a widow, played a role in the liberation of Corellia, lived a bit of quiet life on Ord Mantel, returned to Caspar with her daughter, and became victim yet again to anti-NR assembly. 

 This past year has seen her briefly reinstated on Caspar, then homeless, captured, tortured, freed, recovered for a few months, active role in liberating smuggled slaves, participant on NR 20th Anniv gala committee, infected with an alien parasite and recaptured, freed...and now struggling to get a grip on her sanity. Needless to say: it's been a rough one.

name: McBride
note:
Oh, I have slipped the surly bonds of earth
And danced the skies on laughter-silvered wings;
Sunward I've climbed, and joined the tumbling mirth
Of sun-split clouds and done a hundred things
You have not dreamed of wheeled and soared and swung
High in the sunlit silence. Hov'ring there,
I've chased the shouting wind along, and flung
My eager craft through footless halls of air.
Up, up the long, delirious burning blue
I've topped the windswept heights with easy grace
Where never lark, or even eagle flew.
And, while with silent, lifting mind I've trod
The high untrespassed sanctity of space,
Put out my hand, and touched the face of God.

note:

The Wit and Wisdom (?) of Rook Barnsdale:
 
Sometimes you just have to know when enough is enough. And then you have to tell others, too. Loudly. Sometimes with a blunt object.
Some days it just doesn't pay to chew through the leather straps in the morning.
Some say danger is the spice of life. Me, I say it's an acquired taste.
Aliens are people, too. They just look kinda funny.
There IS a such thing as luck. It doesn't leave calling cards, and you'd sure better not count on it, but it's there.
We can't choose our enemies, just our friends... kinda.
True friends are rare, so treat 'em right. The benefits far outweigh the upkeep.
Trust people, not organizations. The best intentions can be bollixed up by the worst people, when everything's decided by committee.
Hokey religions and ancient weapons often /are/ a good match for a blaster by your side. But if the blaster's all you've got, it still does the job just fine.
 
"May the Light shine forever!" -Leoric, /Visionaries/
 
In Flanders fields the poppies blow
Between the crosses, row on row
That mark our place; and in the sky
The larks, still bravely singing, fly
Scarce heard amid the guns below.
 
We are the Dead. Short days ago
We lived, felt dawn, saw sunset glow,
Loved and were loved, and now we lie
In Flanders fields.
 
Take up our quarrel with the foe:
To you from failing hands we throw
The torch; be yours to hold it high.
If ye break faith with us who die
We shall not sleep, though poppies grow
In Flanders fields.
 
-John MacCrae (1872-1918)

name: Kiraum
background:
Cloud City is the famous "city in the sky" that serves as the headquarters of FTI. Since the Empire withdrew more than a decade ago, Bespin and Cloud City have gone back to a quiet place where anyone is welcome.
        As such, we are always hiring people for any number of positions doing any number of jobs. From weapons dealers to casino managers, as well as space truckers, security personnel, and starship technicians. Prospective business owners and investment opportunities are welcome. Page or @mail me for info.
note:
FoxTech Industries is a large corporation based out of independent space. We have shipyard facilities in Cloud City on Bespin and on Nar Shadda. You can land on the FTI hangar in each place without a code. We specialize in repair and upgrades, we can even do the jobs that are frowned upon in systems that have laws. Prices vary by job, so contact an FTI employee for details.
        We are also a leader in wholesale and retail weapons sales. Our extensive experience and contacts in nearly every faction allow us to offer an impressive selection that our competitors balk at. See +background KM 1 and 2 or contact an FTI representative for more info.
        As if that wasn't enough business for one corporation, we have space truckers hauling bulk freighters all the time. We pull more cargo than any other corporation because we have the capacity for it. We are always hiring qualified pilots interested in living the life od a space trucker. Contact myself of Wombat for details on that.

name: Lyra
homeworld: Born on Alderaan, raised on Nar Shaddaa.
occupation: Thug.  Or Thugess if you prefer.
background:
Lyra has a number of levels of background that you may wish to peruse as curiousity takes you. Each is coded:

        1 - A bit of trivia on her, including why she changed her name.

        2 - Knowledge easily gained.

        3 - Knowledge that might be gained with a trip of Nar Shaddaa.

        4 - What a trained investigator with a serious interest, a ship, and credits to burn might learn.

        5 - What you might learn if you were obsessed with finding out Lyra's past or were just extraordinary in some way: Wealthy, lucky, or well-connected.
away: Off doing something unpleasant to people who don't deserve it, most likely. @mail or page me when I'm on.
note:
Image: The easiest way to imagine Lyra is if a young Grace Kelly were cast as some tough, brassy inner-city gangster girl. Imagine Grace goes out of her way to study for her role. That's Lyra in a nutshell, she walks the walk and talks the talk, but she just doesn't look the part.

        The Way Life Is: "There are no Jedi Knights, not like the ones in the stories. I don't think there ever were. And the Force? The Force could care less about us. Horrible am I? Look, I believed in the Force, once. All of us did back home on Alderaan. We all prayed Mon Mothma's little army and the Force would protect us. One day we were praying *real* hard and hoping, the next day our atoms were blowing away on the solar wind. Life's tough. If you can't protect yourself, do us all a favor and die and get out of the way of those who can. The galaxy is ruled by men with blasters and the will to use 'em, don't *ever* believe any different."

        Quote: "The Hutt. Have you ever thought about these guys? Who let those guys get in charge? A race of shuddering slugs that can move about as fast as a dead shyrack have become criminal masterminds of the galaxy? How did they start threatening people? 'Pay up or I uh...roll over you...really slowly.' Um...sure. Why don't you just do that while I take three steps away and shoot you with my blaster? I just don't get it. I sometimes think we're a part of one of those bad fiction vids with painful acting and green nymphomaniac slave girls, you know?"

name: HM743
note:
HM743 is a Yari-made industreal robot, made to maneuver easily in what most races would consider nonstandard terrain. He has been augmented as part of an experimental project in increasing droid autonomy, and is owned by the Caspian military. His turn-ons include numbers, metalworking, and large-scale construciton projects running ahead of schedule. His turn-offs include abrasive dust, people who think that engineering is not applicable to solving all problems, and incoming fire.
 
        His advanced neural processors are currently linked to a safety lock system, which shuts him down, performs a core dump, and contacts the CDMC whenever he concludes that his current course of action will bring a sentient being to harm. It goes off a lot, not through any sort of malice in his nature, but rather as a consequence of his advanced reasoning ability. Sometimes, he has trouble completing a senta-*SAFETY LOCK TRIGGERED*

name: Tracer
note:
Elana Tracer, known to her friends as Ellie or simply El, is a local Caspar girl, born to human settlers who came from else-planet to find a better life. A former ace A-Wing pilot for the Caspar Military, she left and joined the professional swoop racing circuit as a racer and as manager of several tracks and shops throughout the galaxy, until her homeworld called her to serve in political office where she held appointment as Minister of State before being appointed President of the Union. Following her veto of the Senate's rejection of Darth Malign's Declaration of Annexation a bloodless coup by the military ended her term as Presav. Subsequently she ceased living primarily on Caspar, only visiting her Marin Mountain properties from time to time. After not being seen publicly for over a decade, Elana emerged as the new Moff of Selene and CEO of KDY-SFS for Tyler Damion's Imperium.
        For publicly known facts about Tracer see SWINFO LEGENDS & SWINFO LEG TRACER. Her full background and many logs (sorely NOT up to date these days, I'm afraid) can be found at the web page shown above.
        In SW MUSH: The Movie, Tracer might be played by Winona Ryder

name: Snarl
background:
Snarl was born of a high Kasa Horansi family on Mutanda and selected out of a group of likely cubs for training in the military arts. She did well under her Swordmaster and was put in charge of guarding the young Gorvan Crown Prince. This honorable appointment turned out to be her undoing -or so she thought at the time- when the young Gorvan fell for his attractive Guardian. Even though she did nothing to encourage his interest at all, one night Snarl was attacked by a group of masked Horansi, subdued, and then shipped off planet. She was sold into slavery by her own kind.

 Though her slavery did not last long (she staged a very bloody escape), Snarl harbored resentment for a long time over this horrible wrong that her own people had done to her. Until recent developments anyway, when the very land her old kingdom existed on was destroyed... utterly and completely. Blood-kin and enemy alike are gone now... The past would seem to be dead; what does the future hold?

name: Webb
homeworld: Born on Corulag. Everything since is subjective.
background:
There's not really much to say. Webb is just a Marine. He doesn't race swoops, run cargo, fly a starfighter, rub elbows with high society, or partake in conspiracy, and he's too clean-living (and not to mention too busy) to be schmoozing at the bar every night. And forget the political realm, thank you very much - he's still has qualms about his kind voting, let alone meddling. He doesn't even patrol the streets of Caspar, Jewel of the Union it might be. How exciting could that possibly be?

See +background Webb 1 for a Table of Contents of +background entries.
away:
"No matter how much we share with all mankind, each of us is bitterly alone. Our true distance from our neighbor begins to yawn when we at length discover the unexplored darkness within ourselves, and begin to understand that he who travels farthest and fastest into his darkness must travel alone; and that the ultimate destination of every traveller is always himself."


-John Keats
note:
In SW MUSH - The Movie, Webb would be an extra or a bit character amid a cast of Jedi, smugglers, racers, and smarmy CGI aliens, because Lucas is a hack. Note also that despite what you'll see below about Webb being a legend, and what you'll see in SWINFO Legends, the character doesn't have any kind of galaxy-spanning reputation or fame. He doesn't chum around among the movers and shakers, or get his face plastered all over the media in any kind of memorable way. When he is in the public eye, he is just a Marine - a good one, perhaps, but one of many, and not a particularly high-ranking one at that.

name: Rellik
background: Jarl Rellik's sudden appearance within the Empire several years ago is surrounded with a lot of rumor and very little fact. What is known is that Rellik served in the Imperial Navy as an engineer before being transferred to R&D. It is also known that Rellik served with Bacaharan Valak for some time, as well. However, Rellik slipped into obscurity for years, which has been rumored to be a direct result of an affair with a Moff's daughter that would result in the birth of Venus Darkstar. Many years would pass before Jarl resurfaced as an Advisor to the now Emperor Valak. After Grand Admiral Adlerson retired, Rellik was made Valak's Warlord and tasked to create a special Task Force fleet and engage CDU forces. However, as fast as Rellik came into such power, he fell back into obscurity, only to resurface two years later as an employee of FoxTech Industries. Oddly enough, he has disappeared again, coincidentally around the same time that Emperor Valak was last seen.
note: In SW MUSH: The Movie, Gary Oldman is cast as Jarl Rellik.

note:
Star Wars: Sagas MUSH - mush.swsagas.net:1138 - www.swsagas.net

Star wars: Sagas is having a grand re-opening the weekend of Fri Sept 14-Sun Sept 16! Join us as we explore the advancement in our timeline, starting in the harrowing days between the destruction of Alderaan and the Battle of Yavin.

We are primarily a D6 pre-gen MUSH, with a fully stocked roster loaded with a variety of character types. From heroes to villains, military personnel to criminals, smugglers to pirates, Imperials to Rebels, we have over a hundred characters to choose from. There's even a chance the character you pick is secretly Force Sensitive!

Don't see someone you like? We now have a player chargen system as well, allowing you to make a character of your own choosing.

In addition to that code, we have a newly added reputation system, economics, space, IC communications, character advancement/+noms, and language. We also have several features, which are well in scale with the rostered characters, yet still true to their canon appearances. 

Stop by and see us! Either telnet to mush.swsagas.net:1138, or visit our Wiki at http://www.swsagas.net/.

name: Moirae
note:
The Moirae or Moerae (in Greek the "apportioners", often called the The Fates), in Greek mythology, were the white-robed personifications of destiny (Roman equivalent: Parcae, euphemistically the "sparing ones", or Fata; also equivalent to the Germanic Norns). The Greek word 'moira' literally means a part or portion, and by extension one's portion in life or destiny. They controlled the metaphorical thread of life of every mortal from birth to death (and beyond).

name: Buck
business: Drinking, Smooching and Combat...sound like Russell Crowe, hun?
background:
The Rincewind of Stormtroopers. He doesn't scare the Rebellion and he doesn't generally try to. He likes his liquor, he loves the ladies and he ain't afraid to do something (morally) right. Like I said, the Rincewind of Stormtroopers.

        Currently on permanent leave from the Empire after failing a psych evaluation. Yes, even they have no idea what to do with him. He admires the structured life of the Empire, but also the free-thinking and peace loving of the Rebellion. Strange, Strange man indeed. He generally gets along well with other species, who tend to tilt their head at this man as some aren't sure if he's really on the level or just some more lying Imperial scum. After a time, a few incidents and some words spread about that yes, this guy is for real.

        His talents include knowledge in hand-to-hand, small and large arms knowledge, counter insurgency and tactics with some minor training in Intelligence gathering. He is noted to have vast training in 'forced' extradition. In short, he can get in, grab and has a superior talent in running like hell. Again, the Rincewind of Stormtroopers.
note: In "Star Wars MUSH: The Movie" Buck would be played by Gil Gerard

After an accident in the droid lab damaged it's antennae Fitz was unable to communicate with the hive collective and the immense, alien feeling of isolation and lonliness it suddenly felt led towards a psychological break. Unable to be treated by the Verpine collective Fitz was sent to recieve treatment from doctors outside the Roche Asteroid Field and now, having been released under his own care, Fitz is determined to learn what it means to live in a wider galaxy as an individual. He used his severance package from the Roche Corporation to purchase a swarm of "Hatchling" droids and has started to explore, salvage any and all space wrecks that he can find to build up his supply of spare parts.

name: Turis
occupation: Technical Lead for Caspar Unlimited's Kichnar Team
background:
An intellectual prodigy, Turis Nuiv quickly rose to the top of her class. Despite the tragedy that had ruined all but the domed city remnants on her homeworld of Clak'dor VII, Turis continued to live what she considered to be the lifestyle of an intellectual, sophisticated Bith. She was involved in artistic dance productions in her spare time and learned several languages. Attractive from her dancing, Turis was a part time model for several Bith publications during her university years to pay for her expensive doctorate, which she achieved quickly.

Even before she earned her doctorate, the bith had a fascination with the biological wasteland of Clak'dor VII. As Doctor Turis Nuiv, she began working on studying the ever-changing wasteland and biological weapons that continue to make the non-domed areas uninhabitable. Working from and living out of a landspeeder, Dr. Nuiv continuously made improvements to environment suits, armor, and droids to improve decontamination and encapsulation technologies.

Recently, she has moved away, working for Caspar Unlimited's Kichnar Team, though she has quite a bit of freedom and can be found pretty much anywhere. She's used that freedom to pursue swoop racing as a fairly serious hobby. She can sometimes be found racing under the moniker of "The Yellow Dart."

name: Ezlo
background: A lifelong criminal and all-around poor citizen.
note:
A shabby, jobless, brightly-colored vagrant from the swamps of Zeltros. Ezlo wanders the Galaxy aimlessly, generally high on psychedelics, tranquilizers, or industrial solvents. His attempts at seduction are notoriously grotesque, especially when they are successful. But he maintains a positive outlook, convinced that one day he'll pull off a 'Big Score' that will solve all of his self-inflicted problems.

He can typically be found passed out under bridges, behind dumpsters, or in bathroom stalls. Legend has it that if you set out a can of paint thinner for him, Ezlo will bring you good fortune, leaving behind nothing but loose beard hairs and an empty can.

        Themesong: Stroking My Beard - The Beards

name: Jacali
note:
Apathetic. Secretive. ... Strange...

Incurably curious, fascinated by the biologically bizarre, Jacali is prone to viewing individuals as little more than walking meatbags or frustrating case studies, and loses interest in the mundane in a hurry. She is an abrasive personality with a bedside manner that has been described as 'lacking' and tends not to 'mesh' with the majority of people in her sociopathic disconnection, but when engaged on the topic of experimental treatment or scientific advancement, her attentions might be kept for a time.

Logical and deeply analytical, as dry and cold as Hoth's deepest, darkest recesses, she's unlikely to be a friend to many, but goodness if she isn't just super handy to have around when things go awry.

For now, Bespin holds a particular level of interest to her for reasons unknown to the masses, and so it's there where she can normally be seen. If one frequents the grittier (read: Poorer) areas, chances are they might have caught a glimpse of our mysterious good doctor, though what it is that takes her to that place so regularly is a riddle, indeed.

Word on the street suggests she has connections to a cabalistic, maybe-mythical upcoming figure in the criminal underworld known only as the 'Queen of Hearts', but most assume this to be just another tale meant to keep the rabble in line in those bitter, neglected places.

name: Mox
note:
A former generic thug for the Hutts on Tatooine, Shoog-Mox Klagg was lured away from a life of crime with promises of becoming a famous model on Cloud City!

But when his dreams of wealth and fame didn't quite pan out for him, he managed to get the next best thing. Now he's in a position of great power and responsibility, serving as one of Cloud City's protectors in the Wing Guard.

He... basically rides around on a platform scooter and gives tickets to people who park their ships too close to the fire suppression systems.

But he gets to wear a boss hat. Totally boss.

name: Rawnie
background:
Hmm. You look at me now and see only the warrior, right? A product of blood thirsty conquest and war? One of those warmonger Mandalorians. Hide the children, hide the valuables. Death and destruction follows on their heels.
        Oh, how you have been deceived. My people are one of Honor. We honor our Clans. We honor our words. We honor our foes. It is within the arms of honor that we strive to better ourselves. Stone to the steel, honing the edge to a better keenness.
        But it is not fully of my people that you are speaking with me, yes? You wish to know more of this being whom has comes to your worlds. I am Rawnie Qrowe, of Clan Distayre now. We are one of the remaining clans of the Old Mandalorians. I was born to Clan Awaud originally. The Clan of Disyayre took in those few of us who were left after the Battle of Xorrn. Picture trying to hold your Clan brothers together while under heavy suppression fire. That was one of my last memories before waking up aboard the Clan ship of the Distayre Clan.
        I owe them my life, possibly my sanity. I will carry their flame and the flame of Clan Awaud forward until they prise me from my armor the final time.

        Ahh, yes, yes. I know. I have not explained yet the hows and whys of my arrival in the Caspian Union. Well, I seek to retrieve relics of my people while serving as allowed in the defense of your systems.

        I could boast of my skills in medical aiding, or the retrieval of information when it is required. Or you could test them yourself. I ask only the ability to retrieve items from sites left from the Invasion the Dar-jetti led us on many a cycle passed.
